overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The character moves from a dark covered walkway under an overpass into a bright open intersection with heavy traffic and holographic advertisements, then crosses a large crosswalk with yellow stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway under the overpass with wet reflective pavement

entered.detail: illuminated blue neon sign reading 'PAWNSHOP' on green building facade
concrete highway overpass structure overhead blocking the sky
large concrete blocks lining the edge of the walkway
futuristic vehicles parked along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, enclosed pedestrian walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The wet pavement reflects neon lights from a pawn shop sign on the right. Concrete barriers line the path, and futuristic cars are parked along the left side in the shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon signage and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the dark overpass into brighter open street with mixed natural and neon lighting
transition from enclosed walkway to open urban street with visible sky and towering buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past futuristic storefronts and towering neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure emitting bright purple neon light
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated graphics
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and neon signage
tall palm tree visible against the sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass, the scene opens into a bright futuristic commercial street. The character walks past a glowing purple neon pillar and holographic billboards mounted on towering glass buildings. Traffic moves along the multi-lane road to the left, and other pedestrians walk ahead on the reflective tiled sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: under elevated transit structure with glowing green canopy

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the overhead transit structure with glowing green neon lights

agents.ego_description: character stops walking and looks up at the overhead architecture and glowing green transit canopy

entered.detail: overhead transit structure with bright green glowing edges and glass panels
clear sky visible through the glass canopy structure
tall cylindrical tower with multiple levels visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive elevated transit structure with glowing green neon edges and glass panels overhead. The character pauses to observe the architecture as the sky becomes fully visible through the transparent canopy. The surrounding futuristic towers and holographic displays remain visible at the edges of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with yellow zebra crossing and heavy traffic

events.description: character steps onto yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection
futuristic sports cars drive past on the road while the character continues crossing

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection following other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and black outfit crossing the street
red sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black striped markings
horizontal red traffic light bar suspended over the intersection
open center of the large intersection with multiple lanes visible

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a massive urban intersection marked with bold yellow zebra stripes. Other pedestrians cross alongside while futuristic sports cars drive past on the wet asphalt. A horizontal red traffic light structure spans the intersection overhead, and towering neon-lit buildings rise on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with food vendor stalls and neon storefronts

events.description: reaches the far side of the intersection and continues along the sidewalk past a food vendor

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a food vendor stall with a colorful umbrella and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food stall with red and yellow umbrella

entered.detail: street vendor stall with large red and yellow striped umbrella
building front with bright blue neon signage and advertisements
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along the far sidewalk past a food vendor stall shaded by a colorful red and yellow umbrella. The sidewalk is lined with black and yellow bollards, and the building facades feature bright blue neon signage. The traffic light structure recedes into the distance as the character continues down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched futuristic intersection. It begins with the character walking through a dark pedestrian walkway beneath a concrete overpass, where wet pavement reflects the glow of a nearby pawn shop. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a bright commercial street filled with purple neon pillars and towering holographic billboards. The camera then tilts upward to reveal a massive elevated transit structure with glowing green edges before descending to follow the character across a wide intersection marked by bold yellow zebra stripes. Finally, the movement continues past a colorful food vendor stall and blue neon signage as the traffic lights recede into the distance.
